Title: Enacts "Brendon's law" relating to motor vehicle speed contests, races, sideshows and street takeovers
Summary: Enacts "Brendon's law" to prohibit participation, including spectators within two hundred feet, of any motor vehicle speed contest, sideshow and street takeovers; authorizes seizure and forfeiture; adds damaging an authorized emergency vehicle as constituting the crime of criminal mischief in the third degree.
LawCode: Amd §1182, add §1212-a, V & T L; amd §145.05, Pen L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to motor vehicle speed contests, sideshows and street takeovers; and to amend the penal law, in relation to the crime of criminal mischief in the third degree
